LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WENDY SACA-MERTENS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINTIS OFF CALENDAR. THE DEMURRER WAS UNTIMELY FILED AND SERVED BY TWO CALENDAR DAYS PURSUANT TO CCP 1005 AND CCP 12C. THE AMENDED DEMURRER WAS CONTINUED BY THE COURT TO JULY 10, 2013 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES AND TO BE SERVED BY JUNE 10, 2013. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY JUNE 26, 2013. REPLY TO BE FILED BY JULY 2, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
